retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from publicly surfaced MCB-controlled references. Source quality is weaker than other banks because detailed public fee and eligibility pages were not surfaced.

notes: Official LinkedIn indicates this is an active debit-card product.
Later official post states ATM withdrawals up to PKR 350,000/day and POS/online spending up to PKR 800,000/day.
Official LinkedIn indicates the card is actively marketed.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free for Sohni Dharti Remittance Current Account customers.

notes: Official LinkedIn states SDRA includes a free PayPak Debit Card.

gaps: No clean official MCB product page or official PDF was surfaced with card-by-card salary, balance, annual fee, waiver, or age data.
Named cards like MCB Visa Gold Credit Card, MCB Visa Platinum Credit Card, MCB Visa Debit Card, and MCB GOLD PLUS were referenced publicly but not with detailed requirement tables.
Source quality here is materially weaker than most other banks because the surfaced official public pages were thin.
